_description: Cron job that runs every morning at 8:00 and asks the LLM to summarize something. Point `cron_tool` at an agent that can search/read/notify, e.g. a websearch module. Replace modul ids to match your setup.
required_linked_modules_hint: You need a websearch module (any typ: websearch) and a notify module (typ: notify). Create those first, then link them here.
